overview.description: The State Street SPDR Bloomberg High Yield Bond ETF (JNK) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg High Yield Very Liquid index. The fund tracks a market-weighted index of highly liquid, high-yield, US dollar-denominated corporate bonds. JNK was launched on Nov 28, 2007 and is issued by State Street.
